description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a dark, rich brown finish and a visible wood grain texture running lengthwise across the tabletop. The tabletop consists of several wide planks, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. The table is supported by four turned wooden legs, each featuring subtle decorative rings and tapering toward the bottom. The edges of the tabletop are slightly beveled, adding a touch of refinement to its otherwise robust design. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for both functional and decorative purposes. This table would be well-suited for use in urban parks, outdoor cafes, or communal gathering spaces.
description: A dark brown, rectangular wooden table with a plank-style top and four turned legs, featuring a rustic yet refined appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, plank-style tabletop and two of the turned legs.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the wood grain and the full width of the tabletop planks.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the tabletop and the opposite pair of legs.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, emphasizing the lengthwise wood grain and leg details.
